description: Tools for checking loyalty points balance, viewing transaction history, and validating redemption before applying points to a booking. The Vibe Booking AI agent uses these to help users understand their points and apply rewards during checkout.

tools.name: get_loyalty_balance
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's current loyalty points balance, its USD equivalent, and any expiry warnings. Use when the user asks 'how many points do I have?' or before showing them their checkout options.

tools.name: calculate_loyalty_redemption
tools.description: Calculate how much discount the user gets by redeeming a specific number of loyalty points against a booking subtotal. Always use this before applying points to confirm the discount and remaining balance. Points must be in multiples of 100, minimum 100.

points.description: Number of points to redeem (multiples of 100, minimum 100)

subtotal_usd.description: Booking subtotal in USD before the discount

tools.returns: points_used, discount_usd, remaining_balance (points after redemption), is_valid (boolean), message (user-facing text)

tools.name: get_loyalty_transactions
tools.description: Get the user's loyalty points transaction history (earned, redeemed, adjusted, expired). Use when the user asks about their points activity or how they earned/spent points.
tools.returns: Paginated list of LoyaltyTransaction objects with type, amount, description, booking_reference, balance_after, created_at
